Constant FACET_DC="FACET_DC".
FacetFieldSidebarWidget - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.widgets
A subtype of CustomSidebarWidget to display a list of possible values of a given SOLR field and link to a search listing of items with a specific value.

Empty default constructor.

FacetItem - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.search
Represents a single facet value with its display label, hit count, and selection state.
FacetItem(String, boolean) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.search.FacetItem
Creates a new FacetItem for active facets received via the URL.
FacetItem(String, String, boolean) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.search.FacetItem
Creates a new FacetItem for active facets received via the URL.
FacetItem(FacetField.Count) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.search.FacetItem
 
FacetItem.FacetType - Enum Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.search
Enumerates the structural types of a facet field, determining how its values are queried, displayed, and filtered in the search UI.
FacetSorting - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.search
Class to create maps for facet values and their respective counts which are automatically sorted according to a given sort order.
FacetSorting.SortingMap<K,V> - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.search
A map container indicating the the contained map is created using one of the getSortedMap methods.

FeatureGenerator - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.maps.features
Converts MetadataDocument objects retrieved from Solr into GeoJSON GeoMapFeature instances for rendering on geo maps.

FeatureQueryGenerator - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.maps.features
Generates Solr search filter queries for geo map features based on coordinate and label metadata extracted from a given MetadataContainer.
FeatureQueryGenerator() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.maps.features.FeatureQueryGenerator
 
featuresAsString - Variable in class io.goobi.viewer.model.maps.SolrFeatureSet
 
FeatureSet - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.maps
Abstract JPA base entity representing a set of geo-map features with a marker style and optional name, persisted in a single table with subclass-specific discriminator values.
FeatureSet() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.maps.FeatureSet
 
FeatureSet(FeatureSet) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.maps.FeatureSet
 
FeatureSetConfiguration - Class in io.goobi.viewer.controller.model
Configuration for a map feature set, describing the type, name, marker icon, Solr query, filter, and metadata lists used to render a group of map features.

Represents a single editable configuration file entry in the config editor, providing metadata such as the file path, display index, type, and read/write accessibility.

fillSelectedMediaHolder(CategorizableTranslatedSelectable<CMSMediaItem>) - Method in class io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.CmsBean
Set the given (wrapped) CMSMediaItem to Media holder set by CmsBean.setSelectedMediaHolder(io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.media.CMSMediaHolder).
fillSelectedMediaHolder(CategorizableTranslatedSelectable<CMSMediaItem>, boolean) - Method in class io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.CmsBean
Set the given (wrapped) CMSMediaItem to Media holder set by CmsBean.setSelectedMediaHolder(io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.media.CMSMediaHolder) Additionally save the given media item if the parameter saveMedia is set to true.
